posts.author: JasperDemeurie (Jasper)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody!

Another feature request here. One that would help us a lot.

Situation:
We have 2 boards within our dropshipping team.
One with (re)activation of clients & one where we have our entire CRM of active and stopped retailers.

Now, if we want to search for a retailer, we might need to check both boards separately to see if a client is already in there. One might: look in the (re)activation tab, not find the client and make the item. This whilst the client could already be (via automations) moved to the CRM board. Making duplicated items.

Solution: having the option to open up the search to multiple boards via the search settings. There are already a couple of options to optimize the search, sadly only within the same board:

image279×124 3.74 KB
